positive: A whimsical, minimalist illustration of a floating geometric cityscape at sunset, featuring clean outlines of crystalline towers, stylized hot air balloons, and gentle parabolic arches. The scene should utilize strong, contrasting jewel-tone colors (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) against a vibrant gradient sky of orange and magenta. Focus on negative space and clear, solid silhouettes. Composition should be centrally balanced and perfectly symmetrical, suitable for large-format apparel printing. Ink bleed should be minimal, emphasizing crisp lines and flat areas of color. Vector art aesthetic, high contrast graphic design, perfect symmetry, modern folk art style.
negative: photorealistic, low contrast, grunge, noisy, blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, copyright, messy, dirty, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, grainy
